# homebrew

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `homebrew`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| -------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `homebrew.autoUpdate` | | |
| `homebrew.brewPrefix` | | |
| `homebrew.brewfile` | | |
| `homebrew.brews` | `list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)` | List of Homebrew formulae to install. |
| `homebrew.cargoPackages` | `list of string` | List of Rust packages to install using cargo install . |
| `homebrew.caskArgs` | `submodule` | Arguments passed to brew install --cask for all casks listed in homebrew.casks . |
| `homebrew.casks` | `list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)` | List of Homebrew casks to install. |
| `homebrew.cleanup` | | |
| `homebrew.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nix-darwin to manage installing/updating/upgrading Homebrew taps, formulae, casks, Mac App Store apps, Visual Studio Code extensions, Go packages, and Cargo crates using Homebrew Bundle. |
| `homebrew.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Homebrew Bash shell integration, which sets up Homebrew’s environment and shell completions . |
| `homebrew.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Homebrew Fish shell integration, which sets up Homebrew’s environment and shell completions . |
| `homebrew.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Homebrew Zsh shell integration, which sets up Homebrew’s environment and shell completions . |
| `homebrew.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Extra lines to be added verbatim to the bottom of the generated Brewfile. |
| `homebrew.global` | `submodule` | Options for configuring the behavior of Homebrew commands when you manually invoke them. |
| `homebrew.goPackages` | `list of string` | List of Go packages to install using go install . |
| `homebrew.greedyCasks` | `null or boolean` | Whether to always upgrade casks listed in homebrew.casks regardless of whether it’s unversioned or it updates itself. |
| `homebrew.masApps` | `attribute set of (positive integer, meaning >0)` | Applications to install from Mac App Store using mas . |
| `homebrew.onActivation` | `submodule` | Options for configuring the behavior of the brew bundle command that nix-darwin runs during system activation. |
| `homebrew.prefix` | `string` | The Homebrew prefix directory, i.e., the value that brew --prefix returns. The default is automatically set based on your system’s platform, and should only need to be changed if you manually installed Homebrew in a non-standard location. |
| `homebrew.taps` | `list of ((submodule) or string convertible to it)` | List of Homebrew formula repositories to tap. |
| `homebrew.user` | `string` | The user that owns the Homebrew installation. In most cases this should be the normal user account that you installed Homebrew as. |
| `homebrew.vscode` | `list of string` | List of Visual Studio Code extensions to install using Homebrew Bundle. |
| `homebrew.whalebrews` | | |
